⚠ Tail Aggregate impressions
–
These impressions are grouped by the DSP under "[tail aggregate]" and are not tied to an individual screen, so they can't be plotted on the map or matched. For a full site-level breakdown, pull a new report with "tail aggregate" disabled in the reporting settings.
